case_title: ROBERT WERNER WEBER VS. YMCA SF NMTC, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY WEBER, ROBERT WERNER AS TO DEFENDANT YMCA SF NMTC, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED FEB-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YMCA SF NMTC, INC.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBER, ROBERT WERNER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT YMCA SF NMTC, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBER, ROBERT WERNER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YMCA SF NMTC, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MATTHEW TODD BEFFA--MANAGER ON DUTY; JENNIFER TROMBLEY--MEMBER SERVICES DIRECTOR; DYLAN MARTIN--WELLNESS COORDINATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.
